data.title: Dow up 450 pts on GDP surprise. Corning gains, Celestica & Abbott drop. Nvidia & Tesla rise.
data.description: On Thursday, there was a significant increase in the Dow Jones index following unexpected positive GDP data. Nvidia and Tesla experienced strong gains during morning trading. The stock market today saw a rise of 450 points in the Dow. Corning showed a notable rally, while Celestica and Abbott faced major losses. This news was covered live but the source was not specified.

data.title: Mendez Vela Design Collection LLC expands partnership with architect Adam Medal, undergoes rebrand for growth and collaboration.
data.description: Miami-based boutique interior design firm Mendez Vela Design Collection, LLC, operating as MVM Design, is commencing the new year by welcoming architect Adam Medal to their team. The company, known for its sophisticated and personalized luxury interiors, is rebranding to align with its development. CEO Osirys Mendez expressed that MVM's essence lies in strategic expansion and purposeful actions. The firm emphasizes collaborative and creative work processes.

data.title: Lucid Group (NASDAQ: LCID) stock rose 18% after securing strong Saudi backing. Cantor Fitzgerald report helped lift shares.
data.description: Shares of Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID) saw a significant 18% surge on Wednesday and extended gains on Thursday after receiving strong support from the Middle East region. Despite limited media coverage, a recent report from Cantor Fitzgerald gave a boost to Lucid's stock following a record low of $9.50 on Tuesday. The stock is currently on an upward trajectory. Analysts at Cantor held discussions with officials from the Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF) regarding the ongoing partnership with Lucid, confirming the Saudi sovereign fund's unwavering commitment to its financial support. Cantor analyst Andres Sheppard highlighted the... Read the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Festi renews market making agreement with Arion Banki for shares on Nasdaq Iceland to boost trading efficiency.
data.description: Festi has recently signed a new market making agreement with Arion Banki concerning the Company’s shares listed on the Main Market of Nasdaq Iceland. This replaces the prior agreement announced on 29 June 2023. The aim of this arrangement is to boost trading activity in Festi’s shares, aiding in market price establishment and ensuring a smooth and transparent price discovery process.

data.title: Victory Bancorp, Inc. in Limerick, PA, declares $0.0650 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 13, 2026.
data.description: In Limerick, Pennsylvania, on January 22, 2026, Victory Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX:VTYB) unveiled a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0650 for each outstanding common stock share. Shareholders of record by the end of business on March 2, 2026, will receive the dividend around March 13, 2026.

data.title: Maximo Wood® Thermo® Ayous treated with BurnBlock® named Best New Product by Golden State Lumber. MIAMI, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: In Miami on January 22, 2026, GMX Group's brand, Maximo Wood®, celebrated the recognition of its Maximo Thermo® Ayous product, treated with BurnBlock® technology, as one of Golden State Lumber's top new products of the year. This innovative wood product stood out among the Best New Products of the Year.

data.title: Inventor creates LIFE SAVER system to detect weapons near entrances, boosting security.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 22, 2026, an inventor from San Dimas, California introduced the LIFE SAVER security system. The inventor aimed to develop a system capable of identifying individuals carrying weapons near building entrances. The LIFE SAVER incorporates advanced monitoring and alert features to enhance security measures.

data.title: Global recreational boat market valued at USD 37.4 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 55.2 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 6.7%. Exclusive data on 33 vendors included.
data.description: A report titled "Recreational Boat Market Research Report 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Recreational Boat Market, valued at USD 37.40 billion in 2024, is forecasted to achieve USD 55.20 billion by 2030, with a growth rate of 6.70% per annum. The global market report covers 33 vendors, reflecting a concentrated market landscape with numerous domestic and foreign competitors. There is intense competition amongst these players in the recreational boat sector.

data.title: Sangoma (TSX: STC; Nasdaq: SANG) sets Q2 fiscal year 2026 results release for Feb 4, 2026 after markets close. Conference call at 5:30 PM ET on the same day.
data.description: In Toronto, Sangoma Technologies Corporation (TSX: STC; Nasdaq: SANG) stated that it will reveal its second quarter fiscal year 2026 results post-market closure on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. Sangoma, known for providing businesses with a selection of on-premises, cloud-based, or hybrid Communications as a Service solutions, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 5:30 PM Eastern Time.

data.title: 17,000 BTC sent to exchanges sparks concerns about deeper sell-off despite spot market improvements post failed $90K rally. Traders see current BTC pricing as discounted.
data.description: Despite a brief surge to $90,000, the price of Bitcoin was unable to maintain this level following a transfer of 17,000 BTC to exchanges. However, the spot market is showing signs of improvement, indicating that traders may see the current BTC price as a bargain.

data.title: Shepherd's Made-to-Measure Menswear, co-founded by Chiefs Kicker Harrison Butker, opening new luxury suit location in Dallas at 5622 Bell Avenue in early 2026.
data.description: A high-end custom suit and tailoring shop will be opening at 5622 Bell Avenue in early 2026, bringing luxury made-to-measure suits to Lower Greenville in Dallas. The new storefront, named Shepherd's, aims to set a new standard in the area. The launch is scheduled for January 22, 2026.

data.title: "Natix on Solana collaborates with Valeo to integrate DePIN data into self-driving AI for safe deployment."
data.description: Natix and Valeo have partnered to develop a decentralized, self-driving camera model aimed at providing a transparent platform for the widespread adoption of physical artificial intelligences (AIs). This collaborative effort seeks to establish a secure foundation for the integration of AI technology, with the goal of enhancing safety in various applications. By leveraging a decentralized approach, the initiative aims to address key challenges in the implementation of self-driving systems. This innovative solution aims to pave the way for the seamless incorporation of AI technologies in diverse industries.
